generated_oml:
// ==================== Digital Twin Entity ====================
instance SystemDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin entity grouping all DT components."
]

// ==================== Sensing Components ====================
instance HokuyoUST110LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑110LX 2‑D LiDAR providing real‑time point‑cloud data from the Physical Twin.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloudTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera delivering depth images and IMU data.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraImageTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance WheelEncoderEgoSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wheel‑encoder derived ego speed sensor reporting vehicle longitudinal speed.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoSpeedDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance SteeringServoAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo position sensor providing current steering angle.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

// ==================== Data Transmitted ====================
instance LiDARRawPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST110LXLidar,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance DepthCameraImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance EgoSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelEncoderEgoSpeedSensor,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoAngleSensor,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

// ==================== Data Objects ====================
instance LiDARRawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point‑cloud stream emitted by the LiDAR sensor.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance DepthCameraImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image frames produced by the RealSense camera.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraImageTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualisationEnabler,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance EgoSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped ego speed values derived from wheel encoder.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped steering angle values derived from steering servo.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

// ==================== Enablers ====================
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serialises and performs unit conversion for all incoming streams (ROS2 DDS topics).",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingService,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes DBSCAN clustering followed by Kalman‑filter tracking on LiDAR point clouds.",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance VisualisationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Renders 3‑D vehicle state, projected path and object tracks for UI visualisation.",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs the ACC control model (ISO 15622 compliant) using speed and steering inputs.",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database storing timestamped ego‑state and object‑track data for reporting.",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

// ==================== Services ====================
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI visualises real‑time vehicle state, projected path, object tracks and generates time‑series reports.",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ProjectedPathInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, TimeSeriesReportInsight,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm runs in the Digital Twin, offloading computation from the on‑board ECU.",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationInsight,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operators enable/disable ACC, set desired speed and invoke emergency braking via UI.",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

// ==================== Insights ====================
instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays current ego speed and steering angle to the operator.",
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Shows the predicted vehicle trajectory based on ACC model output.",
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Presents detected object tracks generated by point‑cloud clustering and tracking.",
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance TimeSeriesReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates downloadable time‑series reports of ego state and object tracks.",
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance ACCComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides diagnostic information about ACC control decisions.",
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

// ==================== Actions ====================
instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to enable Adaptive Cruise Control.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to disable Adaptive Cruise Control.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator sets the desired cruising speed for ACC.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator triggers emergency braking, overriding normal speed control.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

// ==================== Acting Components ====================
instance MotorVoltageActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Generates motor voltage commands to control vehicle speed as issued by ACC or UI.",
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance SteeringServoVoltageActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides voltage commands to set steering angle from ACC or UI.",
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Issues emergency‑braking command that overrides normal speed control.",
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

// ==================== Models ====================
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for grouping LiDAR points into object clusters.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracker for maintaining object tracks across frames.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 compliant ACC model for lead‑vehicle detection and speed set‑point computation.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance Visualisation3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D rendering model for vehicle state, projected path and object tracks.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualisationEnabler,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

instance SQLDatabaseModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL schema for storing timestamped ego state and object‑track data.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler,
    base:isContainedIn SystemDigitalTwin
]

// ==================== Deployment Environment ====================
instance JetsonOrinNanoEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorVoltageActuator,
                SteeringServoVoltageActuator,
                EmergencyBrakingActuator,
                DataTranslationEnabler,
                PointCloudProcessingEnabler,
                VisualisationEnabler,
                ACCControlEnabler,
                DataStorageEnabler,
                DataMonitoringService,
                ComputationOffloadingService,
                RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands back to the PT over the same Wi‑Fi/ROS 2 channel. These include the desired speed computed by the ACC Controlling FE, enable/disable ACC signals, remote‑set desired speed values, and an emergency‑braking command. The Actuation FE on the Physical Twin Entity receives these commands and drives the motor and steering actuators accordingly."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All DT services operate with a real‑time constraint of ≤100 ms end‑to‑end latency between PT and DT (R7). Clock synchronisation across all DTS components is required to an accuracy of 100 ms (R8). Consequently, data collection, processing, and actuation occur at rates sufficient to meet these latency bounds, typically on the order of tens of milliseconds per perception‑control cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows the ISO 23247 reference architecture: the Physical Twin Entity hosts sensor drivers and actuation FE, the Digital Twin Entity hosts Data‑Collecting, Controlling, Presentation, Reporting and Data‑Storage FE, and the User Entity hosts the User‑Interface FE split into 3‑D visualisation and control‑panel components. Cross‑System Data‑Translation FE mediates data format conversion. Communication is ROS 2 intra‑entity and Wi‑Fi inter‑entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during the design/development stage as a high‑fidelity simulation and experimentation platform, and during the operation stage for runtime monitoring, remote management and performance reporting. It therefore spans the designed/ideal and operated life‑cycle stages of the vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by using real sensor streams (LiDAR, depth camera, vehicle speed/steering) and by running the ACC algorithm in real time with latency ≤100 ms. Validity is supported by adherence to ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, clock synchronisation to 100 ms, and by storing raw and processed data for post‑hoc analysis. No explicit verification or uncertainty quantification procedures are described."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The PT and DT communicate over a 802.11 Wi‑Fi network using ROS 2 DDS as the transport protocol. All inter‑entity messages are serialised by the Data‑Translation FE, which also handles unit conversion. The standardized communication interface required by R1 is satisfied by ROS 2 topics and services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity runs on external compute hardware (e.g., a workstation or cloud server) distinct from the PT’s Jetson devices. Each Functional Entity is packaged as a separate ROS 2 node set and deployed on the hardware that hosts the corresponding entity: Physical Twin Entity on the Jetson Orin Nano, Digital Twin Entity on the external host, and User Entity on a user workstation displaying the UI."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT design follows ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) for the layered reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC functional specifications, ISO/IEC 30173:2023 for digital‑twin terminology, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for the 100 ms latency requirement. Communication uses ROS 2, a de‑facto standard for robotic middleware, and mentions OPC UA as a potential implementation for data translation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations are explicitly addressed: the DT must maintain ≤100 ms latency (R7) and 100 ms clock synchronisation (R8) to support real‑time, safety‑critical ACC operation; the ACC algorithm complies with ISO 15622; remote‑management commands (enable/disable ACC, emergency braking) are designed with a Human‑in‑the‑Loop model. No specific cybersecurity mechanisms are described in the document."
]
